free_text: Investigation of gamma transitions in the (n,n'gamma)
Fast neutron spectrum of the thermal reactor.
At fast neutron beam formation filter's set was used
- 1 mm cadmium, 1 gram/cm2 B4-C filter, 50 gram of
metallic uranium and boron 10-B filter of 1 gram/cm2
Gamma energy was measured at the angle 90 deg
relative to neutron beam, intensity measured at
Multiplet and initial level known indefinitely
Used to normalize angular distributions, measured at
398.9 keV gamma were used to normalize data for
Initial level spin and parity known uncertainly
Initial level spin and parity not given
